verdict.moderator_pairing_notes: The moderator correctly identified a full consensus among all five agents in Round 1. No pairings were necessary, and the decision to terminate was appropriate.
verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly followed the evidence hierarchy, prioritizing the hard constraints (linguistic and regulatory evidence) which provided definitive proof of the location. The synthesis was accurate and efficient.
